name: Owner Lead Nurture
description: Operations coordinates prospective-owner intake, qualification, follow-up drafts, and conversion handoff with human approval before any prospect outreach, pricing, proposal, agreement, or system action.

stages.name: Normalize Owner Lead
stages.description: Normalize prospective-owner facts and qualification gaps.

steps.title: Normalize owner lead
steps.instructions: Normalize prospect name, contact refs, property count, property locations, occupancy, motivation, timing, source, requested services, current manager, known pain points, consent/source caveats, and missing facts. Unknown fit, pricing, promises, or legal/compliance constraints must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize prospective-owner lead facts and missing-data flags. No outreach, pricing, proposal, agreement, or system action.

steps.title: Check lead ownership and history
steps.instructions: Check whether a human already owns the lead, prior contact history, opt-out or consent state, duplicate lead records, and any active proposal. If already owned, surface status and do not stage duplicate outreach.
steps.dispatch_title: Check owner lead ownership and history
steps.dispatch_body: Check lead ownership, consent, and history. No outreach or system writes.

stages.name: Draft Nurture Packet
stages.description: Draft qualification and follow-up materials without contacting the lead.

steps.title: Draft lead nurture packet
steps.instructions: Draft qualification notes, follow-up email/text/call outline, discovery questions, property-management fit caveats, proposal-readiness flags, and management-agreement handoff trigger. Draft-only; do not contact the prospect, quote pricing, promise terms, or create CRM actions.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft lead follow-up and qualification packet only. No external sends, pricing, proposals, or system writes.

steps.title: Review lead nurture packet
steps.instructions: Review fit, consent, duplicate state, outreach tone, pricing risks, and proposal readiness before approval.
steps.human_prompt: Review owner-lead packet before prospect outreach, pricing, proposal, or system action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage Nurture
stages.description: Human approval gates prospect outreach and conversion handoff.

steps.title: Approve lead nurture action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or assign before any prospect email, text, call, proposal, pricing statement, agreement handoff, meeting invite, owner-facing document, or CRM/system write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before owner-lead outreach, pricing, proposal, agreement handoff, meeting, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved lead package
steps.instructions: Stage approved outreach drafts, discovery questions, meeting notes, proposal handoff metadata, approval source, unresolved needs_verification fields, and next owner for human release. Do not send, schedule, quote, propose, or write external systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved lead nurture package for human release. No external sends, pricing, proposals, meetings, or system writes.
